description: catwalk has come up with yet another scrumptious pair of off-duty sandals for women. Crafted with an eye for high fashion and a feel for superior comfort, this pair is a closet essential. Style this with a feminine top and skinny jeans or ethnic outfits. Upper Toe separator with colourful leather straps Embossed branding on the footbed Smooth footbed with modern design for comfort and style Outsole TPR outsole Textured grooves with a raised flower shaped heel Embossed branding on the rubber outsole Sandal Care Wipe surface with a clean, dry cloth Do not store in direct sunlight
